ops.text:
## DECISION: OPTION B (team-lead) — amendments pre-registered BEFORE first paid eval

Team-lead chose Option B: patch the parser + score ONLY independent references (golden + auditor); v6-only rows unscored. A and C were rejected as measuring agreement-with-v6 on exactly the rows E18 flags v6 unreliable.

### Harness patches applied (E19/bin/e19.py — the harness's own script, authorized)
1. `load_e18_unreliable_keys`: `case list()` now also extracts `dedup_key` from list-of-dict elements (handles `top_contested.json`).
2. `make_ref`: dropped the `baseline_v6` fallback → returns None for rows with no auditor label. `baseline_judge` fetch removed (now unused).
3. `build_panel`: forced (E18) and stratified loops `continue` when `ref is None`, so v6-only rows are NOT appended to the panel → NOT voted (cost control; keeps ~$24).

### Amendment 1 — final panel (rebuilt, seed=1, --stratified 40)
**74 rows, all scorable, all independent references.** Strata: golden 51, unreliable (E18-contested) 16, stratified 7. reference_source: golden 51, auditor 23, **baseline_v6 0**. Reference balance: 52 accept / 22 reject. source_kind: transcript_message 33, interrupt_rejection 17, plan_review 17, question_answer 4, review_comment 3. Per stratum: unreliable n=16 (12 acc/4 rej), golden n=51 (35/16), stratified n=7 (5/2).

### Amendment 2 — MDE at the true n
Card formula at n=74, p=0.0583: SE=0.02724, **MDE=0.10792 → using --mde 0.108** (marginally conservative). Supersedes the earlier 0.094 (n=97 estimate) and 0.098 (n=90). Stopping rule unchanged: winner iff delta >= 0.108 AND 95% paired-bootstrap CI lower bound > 0.

### Amendment 3 — 109 v6-only contested rows EXCLUDED from scoring; WHY
The ~109 E18 top_contested rows that have only a baseline_v6 self-reference are dropped (circular: the baseline candidate IS v6, so scoring it against v6's own stored verdicts rewards agreeing-with-v6 and penalizes correct disagreement — worst exactly where E18 says v6 is unreliable). They are NOT in the panel and NOT voted.

### Amendment 4 — Option D DEFERRED to winner-validation (not rejected)
If the loop yields a winner OR an at/near-MDE candidate: STOP and return with a PROPOSED validation plan for the orchestrator to authorize (NOT run here): (a) mint fresh independent auditor references (opus, role=auditor) for the ~109 v6-only contested rows — ~$41 at $0.372/row, authorized only as part of winner validation; (b) opus-tier (deployed tier) re-evaluation of baseline vs winner; (c) paired baseline-vs-winner on the enlarged clean E18 stratum + golden. Screening here is sonnet (medium) → any winner is presumptive.

### Spend accounting
WFA capture shim (/Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/WFA/scripts/shim/claude) prepended to PATH; CC_WFA_REAL_CLAUDE + CC_WFA_CAPTURE set; judge votes (spawnllm `claude -p --output-format json`) write per-call envelopes with total_cost_usd. Sum envelopes for per-candidate spend; char-based estimate is the fallback. Hard guard = eval-count cap (--iters 4 = baseline + ≤3 candidates) + $30 ceiling.

Run config: `run --judge real --tier medium --metric combined --iters 4 --concurrency 8 --mde 0.108 --author command --author-cmd 'claude -p --model claude-fable-5' --rebuild-panel --stratified 40 --seed 1`. Launching in background with a baseline ceiling monitor next.
